Real child JVMs run isolated A/B/C roots with ephemeral test-local CA/certificate/trust fixtures. Node A is the initial S3 coordinator, node B is the surviving read and repair target, and node C is a surviving voter and named repair source. WebTestClient and AWS CLI drive the existing S3 endpoint. The ephemeral PKI is test-only; production certificate enrollment, custody, rotation, revocation, and expiry monitoring are outside this topology.
Deployment: Isolated Real-Process A/B/C Acceptance Topology
